Off Calendar Nov-13-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-05-2024 Amended

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-02-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FIRSTSERVICE RESIDENTIAL CALIFORNIA, LLC'S Amended MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Granted. Even assuming that Code of Civil Procedure 1281.98 applies to the parties' arbitration agreement, defendant did not violate that section because the parties have not completed their contractually required mediation, which is a condition precedent to arbitration.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. 1; Special Interrogatories, Set No. 1; Form Interrogatories, Employment Law; Form Interrogatories, General; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-14-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JEANINE SCALERO, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP (tel: 213-270-9600) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ARTI LAL , AN INDIVIDUAL Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. 1; Special Interrogatories, Set No. 1; Form Interrogatories, Employment Law; Form Interrogatories, General; And Request For Sanctions.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to compel denied without prejudice pending a resolution of the motion to compel arbitration.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and email it to Judge Pro Tem Scott Borrowman.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (525/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
